nodes.name: Every 6 Hours IST
nodes.notes: Fires at 00:00, 06:00, 12:00, 18:00 IST. Workflow timezone is Asia/Kolkata (see Settings). The API endpoint deduplicates via audit_log — items alerted in the last 24 hours are suppressed server-side, so running every 6 hours is safe.

nodes.name: Fetch Low Stock Alerts
nodes.notes: GET /api/inventory/low-stock-alert (internal auth, tier_2+ orgs only). Returns { alerts: [...], meta }. The endpoint handles deduplication (24-hour suppression per item) and writes to audit_log before responding, so no feedback call is needed after sending.

nodes.name: Has Alerts
nodes.notes: Short-circuit: if the API returned an empty alerts array (all items deduped or no low-stock items), skip the split+send steps entirely.

nodes.name: Split Into Alerts
nodes.notes: Fans the alerts array to one item per inventory alert. Each item contains: organization_id, owner_phone, language_preference, inventory_id, item_name, current_quantity, unit, days_supply. The Split node is the last 1:1 node; the Send node references it for org/phone lineage.

nodes.name: Has Phone
nodes.notes: Defense-in-depth: owner_phone and item_name must be present. The API enforces this; this node catches contract drift.

nodes.name: Send Low Stock Alert

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ to: $json.owner_phone, type: 'template', orgId: $json.organization_id, template: { name: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'inventory_alert_gujaratii' : 'inventory_alert', language: { code: $json.language_preference === 'gu' ? 'gu' : 'en' }, components: [{ type: 'body', parameters: [{ type: 'text', text: String($json.item_name) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.current_quantity) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.unit) }, { type: 'text', text: String($json.days_supply) }] }] } }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/whatsapp/send (internal auth) → Meta Cloud API. Sends inventory_alert template (Utility) to the org owner — NEVER to a customer chat (Rule A). Template body variables: {{1}}=item_name, {{2}}=current_quantity, {{3}}=unit, {{4}}=days_supply. Gujarati variant: inventory_alert_gujaratii (double trailing 'i' — intentional, matches Meta submission).

nodes.name: Log Alert Sent

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ orgId: $('Split Into Alerts').item.json.organization_id, chatPhone: $('Split Into Alerts').item.json.owner_phone, messageType: 'low_stock_alert_sent', timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: POST /api/analytics/log-intent → PostHog. Privacy-safe: orgId + event type only. Reads org/phone from Split node (last 1:1 node) since Send response strips them.

nodes.name: Error Trigger
nodes.notes: Set this workflow as its own Error Workflow in Settings > Error Workflow.

nodes.name: Log Error

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ source: 'n8n_low_stock_alert', error: $json.error?.message, workflow: $json.workflow?.name, node: $json.execution?.lastNodeExecuted, executionId: $json.execution?.id, timestamp: new Date().toISOString() }) }}

nodes.notes: Logs failures to Sentry via /api/errors/log. Never messages a customer chat.
